share_need: Share urgent local needs so volunteers can be assigned quickly.
problem_submitted_successfully: Problem submitted successfully. Your report has been queued for review.
description_placeholder: Briefly describe the issue and immediate need
home_hero_title: Coordinate social impact responses with startup-speed precision
home_hero_text: SmartAid helps NGOs identify urgent community needs, allocate resources faster, and deploy volunteers with confidence from one modern command layer.
home_hero_image_alt: NGO volunteers collaborating on field response planning
features_text: Designed like a modern startup product while staying practical for field teams on mobile networks.
feature_live_need_text: Rank field reports instantly with severity intelligence so urgent cases are handled first.
feature_volunteer_match_text: Match available volunteers by skill, location, and urgency to improve outcomes on the ground.
feature_transparent_ops_text: Track submissions, assignments, and progress in one clean control center for NGO teams.
step_collect_text: Field workers submit needs with location, severity, and affected people in under a minute.
step_prioritize_text: The platform highlights critical incidents so your team focuses on life-impacting cases first.
step_deploy_text: Assign volunteers and resources quickly, then monitor actions through live dashboard workflows.
cta_title: Ready to launch coordinated relief at scale?
cta_text: Move from scattered updates to one intelligent workflow for submission, prioritization, and volunteer deployment.
search_by_name_skill_location: Search by name, skill, or location
no_volunteers_found: No volunteers found for the selected search and filters.
no_needs_found: No needs found for the selected filters.
need_desc_1: Outbreak of fever, no medical facility nearby and urgent medicine support needed.
need_desc_2: Handpump has failed for three days and families are walking long distances for clean water.
need_desc_3: Temporary shelter households are short on dry ration kits for the week.
need_desc_4: Community study center needs notebooks and lights after recent storm damage.
need_desc_5: Families displaced by heavy rainfall require tarpaulins and emergency bedding.
need_desc_6: Pregnant women need transport support for monthly checkups at district clinic.
need_desc_7: School meal stock is exhausted and children need emergency nutrition kits.
need_desc_8: Village tanker schedule disrupted and temporary supply support is required.
people_affected_required: People affected must be at least 1.
